# dokploy_port (Resource)

A published port on a Dokploy application (host port → container port).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "dokploy_port" "metrics" {
  application_id = dokploy_application.api.id
  published_port = 9090
  target_port    = 9090
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_id` (String) Application that owns the port. Changing forces replacement.
- `published_port` (Number) Host port (published).
- `target_port` (Number) Container port (target).

### Optional

- `protocol` (String) `tcp` (default) or `udp`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import dokploy_port.metrics <portId>
```
